content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible curving leftward, and the car appears well-positioned near the center of the track.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 26, target index = (26+5) % 121 = 31
- Target WP31: x=7.2724, y=1.5659
- Car: x=6.7770, y=0.8493, heading=22.182°
- dy = 1.5659 - 0.8493 = 0.7166, dx = 7.2724 - 6.7770 = 0.4954
- bearing = atan2(0.7166, 0.4954) = 55.37°
- delta = 55.37 - 22.182 = +33.19° → steer left (positive)

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3807m, distance_from_center = 0.00544m
- is_left_of_center = true, edge_distance (left) = 0.3807 - 0.00544 = 0.3753m → well clear
- No boundary override needed

Delta ~+33.2° → |delta| 30-50°, speed=1.0-1.5, steering_angle=15-20. Use steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 (delta near lower bound, car is tracking well).

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead, WP31 bearing gives delta ~+33.2° (left), continuing with steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 to follow the curve while well-centered.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around WP22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading ~22° (nearly due east-northeast), well-centered on track.",
    "Right curve ahead requires progressive left steering (positive delta) to follow waypoints.",
    "Steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 is appropriate for delta ~30-35°.",
    "No objects on track detected, boundary well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.5293, 6.6131, 6.6980, 6.7770],
    "y": [0.7205, 0.7527, 0.7957, 0.8493],
    "heading": [7.069, 11.232, 16.130, 22.182]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP31 at (7.272, 1.566): bearing=55.37°, delta=+33.19° → moderate-left steer.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
